_comment: Reusable Meshy AI generation manifest for Aurora Vigil 3D actors. Driven by tools/meshy_assets.py. Pipeline per asset: text-to-3d preview -> refine (textured) -> remesh (mandatory, controls topology/polycount) -> download GLB. All content is original IP: no Superman/DC names, logos, capes, red-and-blue costumes, cities, villains, or story beats.
negative_prompt: cape, flowing cloak, red and blue costume, superman, batman, marvel, dc comics, copyrighted superhero, brand logo, text, watermark, low quality, deformed, extra limbs

assets.name: The Lumen
assets.prompt: Original near-future superhero character, full body standing T-pose, athletic adult figure in a sleek teal and matte-black armored bodysuit, glowing gold hexagonal chest emblem, swept-back gold ion mantle fins mounted on the shoulders and back, smooth helmetless head with short hair, no cape, heroic confident proportions, stylized game-ready character, clean silhouette

assets.name: Rogue Civic Drone
assets.prompt: Small non-humanoid civic security quadrotor drone, dark purple and gunmetal angular chassis, four short rotor arms with ducted fans, a single glowing teal cyclops sensor eye on the front, compact hovering sci-fi robot, no humanoid features, game-ready prop, clean design
